data.title: As a developer, I verify that path-referencing agents auto-consume the new rule and the paused story produces a passing plan
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Verify that agents referencing the shared standard by path (red-test-writer, code-reviewer-test-quality, red-test-evaluator) automatically consume Rule 5 without modification. Then run the smoke test: re-run /dso:implementation-plan on the paused instruction-file story 8163-83a4 and confirm the resulting plan passes TDD plan review without deadlocking on behavioral assertion demands.
**Why**: This is the end-to-end verification that the unified testing philosophy works in practice. The path-reference confirmation ensures no agent modifications were missed; the smoke test on 8163-83a4 proves the deadlock is eliminated.
**Scope**:
- IN: Read-only path-reference confirmation for red-test-writer.md, code-reviewer-test-quality.md, red-test-evaluator.md; smoke test: re-run /dso:implementation-plan on story 8163-83a4 and verify plan passes TDD plan review
- OUT: Any modifications to agent definition files; any modifications to the shared standard or implementation-plan (those are sibling stories)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, agents that already reference the standard by path (red-test-writer, test-quality-overlay, red-test-evaluator) are confirmed to automatically consume the new rule with no modifications to agent definition files
  ← Satisfies: "Agents that already reference the standard by path automatically consume the new rule — verified by read-only path-reference confirmation, no modifications to agent definition files"
- When this story is complete, re-running /dso:implementation-plan on the paused instruction-file story 8163-83a4 produces a plan that passes TDD plan review without deadlocking on behavioral assertion demands
  ← Satisfies: "After deployment, re-running /dso:implementation-plan on the paused instruction-file story 8163-83a4 produces a plan that passes TDD plan review without deadlocking"

## Considerations

- [Testing] The smoke test depends on all three sibling implementation stories being complete and committed
- [Reliability] Story 8163-83a4 has its own dependencies (2932-51a6) that may need to be satisfied before re-running implementation-plan
